name: Air harvester
uniques: Pillaging this improvement yields approximately [+10 Gold]
Provides [1] [Oxygen] <in this city> <in cities with a [Advanced Pressurizer]> <hidden from users>
Unavailable <in tiles adjacent to [Air harvester] tiles>

civilopediaText.text: These installations pressurize the thin air around Io and harvest oxygen from the ground and atmosphere, hopefully providing enough for any humans who want to live here.

name: Trench
uniques: Can be built outside your borders

civilopediaText.text: Simple defensive measures dug into the ground.

name: Fort

civilopediaText.text: Durable structures, suitable for giving your units a highly defensible position.

name: Road
uniques: Can be built outside your borders

civilopediaText.text: More than just paths cut through the dirt, these channels allow for transmission of power and data between factories as well as improving unit movement.

name: Railroad
uniques: Can be built outside your borders

civilopediaText.text: These more advanced channels allow for rapid movement of material across the Moon.
Reduces movement cost to ⅒ if the other tile also has a Railroad
Provides a +25% [Production] bonus to factories connected to the capital by Railroads
